LanguageData.VFET_LargeFire.description: Produces large amounts of heat and smoke, and burns out after a quadrum. The light from a large fire is visible from afar. As long as it’s burning outdoors, there is a higher chance of wild men wandering in, as well as raids. As with all heat sources, it must be placed indoors so it has a closed space to heat. Refuelable. Due to the size and instability of it, it may eject sparks around itself that may start a fire.
LanguageData.VFET_LargeFire.label: large fire
